objects.name: endemic
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE `endemic` (
  `endemic_id` INTEGER,
  `endemic` TEXT(3),
  PRIMARY KEY (`endemic_id`)
)

objects.name: lifespan
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE `lifespan` (
  `lifespan_id` INTEGER,
  `lifespan` INTEGER,
  PRIMARY KEY (`lifespan_id`)
)

objects.name: moths
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE `moths` (
  `moth_id` INTEGER,
  `scientific_name` TEXT(30),
  `common_name` TEXT(35),
  `origin_id` INTEGER,
  `endemic_id` INTEGER,
  `lifespan_id` INTEGER,
  `average_wingspan` INTEGER,
  `max_wingspan` INTEGER,
  `min_wingspan` INTEGER,
  PRIMARY KEY (`moth_id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`origin_id`)
      REFERENCES `origin`(`origin_id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`endemic_id`)
      REFERENCES `endemic`(`endemic_id`),
  FOREIGN KEY (`lifespan_id`)
      REFERENCES `lifespan`(`lifespan_id`)
)

objects.name: origin
objects.ddl:
CREATE TABLE `origin` (
  `origin_id` INTEGER,
  `origin` TEXT(15),
  PRIMARY KEY (`origin_id`)
)

objects.name: all
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW "all" AS SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id

objects.name: lifespan_below_6
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW lifespan_below_6 AS SELECT scientific_name, origin, lifespan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE lifespan < 6
objects.select:
SELECT scientific_name, origin, lifespan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE lifespan < 6

objects.name: lifespan_not_endemic
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW lifespan_not_endemic AS SELECT common_name, scientific_name, lifespan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE lifespan >= 9 AND endemic = 'No'
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, scientific_name, lifespan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE lifespan >= 9 AND endemic = 'No'

objects.name: lifespan_top5
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW lifespan_top5 AS SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
ORDER BY lifespan DESC, common_name
LIMIT 5
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
ORDER BY lifespan DESC, common_name
LIMIT 5

objects.name: max_wingspan_offset5
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW max_wingspan_offset5 AS SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
ORDER BY max_wingspan DESC, common_name
LIMIT 5
OFFSET 5
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
ORDER BY max_wingspan DESC, common_name
LIMIT 5
OFFSET 5

objects.name: north_america_lifespan_1week
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW north_america_lifespan_1week AS SELECT common_name, lifespan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE origin = 'North America' AND lifespan > 7
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, lifespan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE origin = 'North America' AND lifespan > 7

objects.name: wingspan_over_100
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW wingspan_over_100 AS SELECT scientific_name, common_name, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, average_wingspan, lifespan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE average_wingspan >= 100
objects.select:
SELECT scientific_name, common_name, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, average_wingspan, lifespan
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE average_wingspan >= 100

objects.name: wingspan_sortby_scientific_name
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW wingspan_sortby_scientific_name AS SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE min_wingspan <= 30
ORDER BY min_wingspan, scientific_name
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE min_wingspan <= 30
ORDER BY min_wingspan, scientific_name

objects.name: wingspans
objects.ddl:
CREATE VIEW wingspans AS SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE average_wingspan > 70 AND (max_wingspan > 140 OR min_wingspan < 90)
objects.select:
SELECT common_name, scientific_name, origin, endemic, lifespan, average_wingspan, max_wingspan, min_wingspan, max_wingspan - min_wingspan AS difference
FROM moths
LEFT JOIN origin ON moths.origin_id = origin.origin_id, endemic ON moths.endemic_id = endemic.endemic_id, lifespan ON moths.lifespan_id = lifespan.lifespan_id
WHERE average_wingspan > 70 AND (max_wingspan > 140 OR min_wingspan < 90)
